full_text:
Wu Fan (Wenzi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Fan, styledWenzi. Predicted Huang Zu’s defeat, Liu Biao’s death, Liu Bei taking Yi, Guan Yu’s destruction and Sun Quan’s enthronement. Wu Fan was affiliated with Tao Qian and the Wu Kingdom. Wu Fan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
